name: Tool Card: Read
summary: Displays file read operation results with file path, content preview, and line numbers
goals: Render file read results with syntax-highlighted content
Show file metadata and line number navigation

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card for file read operations. Displays the file path, language-detected syntax highlighting, line numbers, and content preview with optional range display.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Path of the file that was read

parameters.name: startLine
parameters.description: Starting line number for partial reads

parameters.name: endLine
parameters.description: Ending line number for partial reads

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Detected programming language for syntax highlighting

constraints: Must detect file language from extension for syntax highlighting
Must show line numbers alongside content
Must support collapsible content for files exceeding 100 lines

acceptanceCriteria.given: a file read operation result is received
acceptanceCriteria.then: the file path, syntax-highlighted content, and line numbers are displayed

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
